description:
Offered: Day course offered every Semester.
Students assist in faculty-led basic and/or applied research in Psychological Science. Students are expected to complete or conduct a scientific literature review as part of this experience.
Prerequisite(s): A 2.5 cumulative average
Note: This experience is offered primarily to Psychological Science majors or minors, or Neuroscience, Behavior and Cognition minors, of junior or senior standing, and it requires approval of the professor.
